ab: kaykameane wailuku nayyane ku sinsi mwa taudrudripane, lasiugunay ilraulraudru si langay ku kipu.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: sa udanenay taudriudripane, ku sinsi la iyakay, “tadhadhamane kwi cucubunguta tasulravane kwi lrilrikudru tangisasiavava makanaelre.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: makiucaku ki sulraw, anikamani kainaku wadredrele ki lasulraw.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: wadrelaku ku makalra ku adhadhame, yakay belenge ki angatu ngipapapalay, ladrelaku ki kwici wapece ikay ki adringi ki barungulu ki angatu.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: taudriudripane yakay ku zu rigi si lrikulaw, kunadruma kainaku wadreleana kikay lawaudriudripi, kay tadrelaneli kaykameane kiaragadhaku
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: taykalrane ku sasingili, wasasingaku lapadrelaku ki ama si ina.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: lupela lri tupalraku ki ama si ina kela
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
